_comment: Phase 10 close 2026-05-02. Both Phase 9 production bugs fixed: Sprint 10.1 (Bug 2 — MessageFeedback malformed SQL, switched to messageId column lookup); Sprint 10.2 (Bug 1 — TZ-sensitive cursor pagination, TIMESTAMPTZ migration 1777721420875-ChatTimestamptz for chat_sessions + chat_messages timestamp columns; verified under TZ=Europe/Paris). Sprint 10.3 — Redis testcontainer harness extension + bullmq scheduler integration test (+9 tests). Sprint 10.4 — investigated SWC-jest swap to drop --testTimeout=30000 hack; reverted (TypeORM circular @ManyToOne hoisting fails under SWC legacy-decorator emit; Phase 11 follow-up). All 6 it.skip Phase 9 markers in chat-repository-typeorm.integration.test.ts flipped to it() — 41/41 pass with RUN_INTEGRATION=true. BE testCount default 3801 (rises to 3851 with RUN_INTEGRATION). Coverage with RUN_INTEGRATION=true: 91.82/81.38/87.84/92.26.
